message:
feat(fwc): update fwc new scaffold to generate V3-native connectors

Modernize connector scaffold templates so newly generated connectors use
ConnectorRuntime and RetryLoop out of the box:

- Replace FCP2 branding with V3-native FCP / Flywheel Connector
- Generated config.rs: add request_timeout_ms and HttpRetryConfig fields
- Generated error.rs: structured RateLimited { retry_after_ms }, Runtime
  variant, is_retryable(), ConnectorErrorMapping impl
- Generated connector.rs: runtime lifecycle and RetryLoop in invoke path
- Generated api.rs: remove manual retry helper in favor of RetryLoop
- Generated Cargo.toml: add futures-util, remove tokio-stream/tokio
- Generated integration test: add handshake step to happy-path test
- Update 20+ unit tests to match new template output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
